title: Emberveil Additions
description: This is a resource pack very specifically built for Emberveil Modpack.
body:
# 🧱 Emberveil Additions – Resource Pack for Emberveil

## 📌 Description

**Emberveil Additions** is the official **resource pack companion** for the **Emberveil Modpack**, built with custom textures, UI tweaks, and visual polish tailored *exclusively* for the world of Emberveil.
  This pack only changes the logo and splash text & in-game UI. It does not affect in-game textures.

>We have uploaded this to bundle it with my modpacks only, because external resource packs for modpacks wasn't configurable well

From pixel-style menus to immersive overlays, every asset is finely tuned to match **Emberveil’s aesthetic and gameplay experience**. This is not a general-purpose pack — it is a **modpack-specific experience enhancer**.

Whether you're exploring twisted biomes or battling through cursed lands, *Emberveil Additions* adds the **final layer of atmosphere** that makes the modpack come alive.

---

## ⚠️ Important Notice

> ### ❗ Not recommended for standalone or vanilla use!
>
> This pack is **heavily optimized & customised for the Emberveil Modpack** (v0.7+). Using it outside the intended modpack may result in:
>
> - 🚫 Unwanted GUI options.
> - 🚫 Replacement of Minecraft Logo with Emberveil
> - 🚫 Visual inconsistencies
>
> It is **not intended** as a plug-and-play pack for other packs or vanilla gameplay.

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility

- ✅ Works best with **Emberveil Modpack** (version 0.7f and later)
- ⚠️ May have issues outside our environment.
- ❌ Not created for vanilla Minecraft

---

## 📃 License

This resource pack is licensed under the **MIT License**.

You're free to use, modify, and distribute with proper credit — but please **do not misrepresent it as a general-use pack**... 

---
